subcodes.first_line: O My friends in the lands! Some souls are firm and steadfast in the Cause of God, while others have succumbed to discord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیائی فی البلاد بعضی از نفوس در امرالله راسخ و مستقیمند و برخی اختلافرا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @knowledge; recognition of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
